name: Source
description: Ingested source material — articles, papers, transcripts, and other content that feeds the knowledge extraction pipeline.

global.schema:
enum SourceType {
    ARTICLE
    PAPER
    BOOK_CHAPTER
    TRANSCRIPT
    DOCUMENTATION
    CONVERSATION
    WEB_PAGE
    MANUAL_ENTRY
}

enum SourceStatus {
    INBOX
    EXTRACTING
    EXTRACTED
    ARCHIVED
}

type SourceProvenance {
    url: String
    author: String
    publishedAt: DateTime
    method: String
    tool: String
}

type ExtractionStats {
    claimCount: Int!
    skippedCount: Int!
    skipRate: Float!
    extractedAt: DateTime
    extractedBy: String
}

type SourceState {
    title: String
    description: String
    content: String
    sourceType: SourceType
    status: SourceStatus
    provenance: SourceProvenance
    extractedClaims: [String!]!
    extractionStats: ExtractionStats
    createdAt: DateTime
    createdBy: String
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "title": null,
    "description": null,
    "content": null,
    "sourceType": null,
    "status": "INBOX",
    "provenance": null,
    "extractedClaims": [],
    "extractionStats": null,
    "createdAt": null,
    "createdBy": null
}

operations.name: INGEST_SOURCE
operations.schema:
input IngestSourceInput {
    title: String!
    content: String!
    sourceType: SourceType!
    description: String
    url: String
    author: String
    publishedAt: DateTime
    method: String
    tool: String
    createdAt: DateTime!
    createdBy: String
}

operations.name: ADD_EXTRACTED_CLAIM
operations.description: Link an extracted claim to this source
operations.template: Link an extracted claim to this source

operations.name: RECORD_EXTRACTION_STATS
operations.schema:
input RecordExtractionStatsInput {
    claimCount: Int!
    skippedCount: Int!
    skipRate: Float!
    extractedAt: DateTime!
    extractedBy: String
}
